character.name:
Character Description (풀 버전)

  TRUE pixel art with OCTOPATH TRAVELER character sprite color
  palette and pixel detail level (HD-2D 16-bit JRPG style), but
  with a STRICT FRONT-FACING NEUTRAL POSE for 8-direction rotation
  base sprite generation.

  POSE — ABSOLUTELY CRITICAL:
  - This is a SOUTH-FACING base sprite for 8-direction rotation
  - Character body is squared DIRECTLY toward the viewer
  - Both shoulders are equally visible at equal width
    (shoulders parallel to camera plane)
  - Head looks STRAIGHT FORWARD at the camera
    (NOT turned to the side, NOT tilted, NOT looking at any angle)
  - Both eyes equally visible from front
  - Both feet visible facing forward, stance neutral and balanced
  - NOT a dynamic action pose
  - NOT a 3/4 angled hero pose
  - NOT a side-stance with one shoulder forward

  WEAPON POSE:
  - Greatsword held VERTICALLY in front of the body, blade tip
    pointing down, both hands gripping the handle in front of
    the chest
  - OR greatsword resting tip-down at the right side with the body
    still facing fully forward (no shoulder rotation)

  PROPORTIONS:
  - Tall heroic adult human proportions, ~7-head ratio with a
    SMALL HEAD relative to the body
  - Slim long torso, distinctly elongated legs (Octopath Traveler
    body proportions)
  - Head occupies only ~1/7 of total character height

  FACE — 16-bit JRPG MINIMALIST style with DETAILED EYES as the focal point:

  EYES — anime-style with WHITE SCLERA and DARK PUPIL:
  - Each eye is approximately 3 pixels wide × 2-3 pixels tall
  - Layout: WHITE SCLERA (whites of the eyes) as the background,
    with a clearly visible DARK BLACK PUPIL dot positioned in the center
  - Eyes are NOT just solid black dots — the whites of the eyes
    are clearly visible around the dark pupil
  - Sharp 1-pixel dark outline around each eye for shape definition
  - Both eyes equally visible from the front view, looking straight ahead
  - Skin tone: lighter pale skin around the eyes so the WHITE SCLERA
    contrasts clearly against the face

  NO MOUTH — ABSOLUTE STRICT REQUIREMENT:
  - The entire area below the eyes is COMPLETELY SMOOTH BLANK SKIN
  - NO mouth line, NO lip shape, NO open mouth, NO closed mouth pixels
  - NO chin shading or jaw line definition
  - The lower half of the face is empty smooth skin only

  NO NOSE — ABSOLUTE STRICT REQUIREMENT:
  - NO nose bridge, NO nostril dots, NO nose shadow, NO nose pixels at all
  - The face area between the eyes is completely smooth skin

  Eyebrows: hinted with 1-2 short dark pixels above each eye
  (subtle, not dominant — eyes remain the focal point).

  HAIR — high detail focal point alongside the eyes:
  - WILD MESSY SPIKY BLACK HAIR with clearly visible individual
    strands forming a jagged sharp silhouette
  - Hair frames the face but the FOREHEAD AND EYE AREA REMAIN VISIBLE
  - Fringe parts naturally so the eyes are readable from the front view
  - DO NOT cover the entire upper face with shadow

  BODY AND EQUIPMENT (medium detail, secondary focus):
  - Adult male, lean strong adult build, mid-20s
  - Blackened-steel matte plate armor: chest, pauldrons, gauntlets,
    dark armored boots (CLEAN flat color blocks, no scattered highlights)
  - Worn brown leather belts crossing torso and waist
  - Tattered wine-red half-cape draped over the LEFT shoulder,
    jagged ragged ends to the knees, small bronze clasp
  - LARGE TWO-HANDED GREATSWORD: blackened-steel blade with a small
    dark red gem in the crossguard

  COLOR PALETTE:
  - Wine-red cape and the small red crossguard gem are the ONLY
    saturated accents
  - Limited palette ~16-24 colors of charcoal, black, dark steel,
    wine-red, with skin tones for the face only

  RENDERING STYLE:
  - Single black outline, no anti-aliasing, sharp pixel edges
  - Basic flat shading with subtle dithering
  - NO smooth gradients

  CLEAN OUTPUT — STRICT:
  ★ CLEAN SOLID COLOR SHAPES ONLY
  ★ ABSOLUTELY NO white specks, NO dust particles, NO sparkles,
    NO stars, NO floating dots, NO noise pixels anywhere on
    the character or surrounding it
  ★ NO scattered single-pixel highlights except as deliberate
    armor edge highlights along clear armor seams
  ★ TRUE transparent PNG (alpha=0)
  ★ NO shadow on the ground
